questions.question: Describe the main challenge faced by neural networks when training on large datasets and explain how dropout regularization helps to address this issue. (10 marks)
What is the concept of vanishing gradients in neural networks, and how can it be mitigated using techniques such as ReLU activation functions and batch normalization? (15 marks)

Compare and contrast the use of Adam optimizers versus RMSprop optimizers in deep neural networks, including their convergence rates, stability, and suitability for different types of problems. (12 marks)
